w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Implementation of User Registration and Session-Based Login Using PHP and MySQL
Aim: To implement user registration and session-based login using PHP and MySQL.
To design a user registration system, store user data securely in a MySQL database, and implement session-based authentication to manage user login and access control.

A user registration system is an essential part of web applications that allows users to create accounts and securely store their information. Using PHP, developers can design forms to collect user details such as name, email, and password, and process this data on the server side. MySQL is used as the database to store and manage user information efficiently, ensuring data is organized and easily retrievable.

To ensure security, user input is validated and sensitive information like passwords is stored in an encrypted format. Session-based authentication is implemented using PHP sessions, which allows the server to maintain user login state across multiple pages. This helps in controlling access to protected areas of the application and ensures that only authorized users can access certain features.
<input type="email" name="email" class="form-control mb-2" placeholder="Email" required>
<input type="password" name="password" class="form-control mb-2" placeholder="Password" required>
<input type="text" name="username" class="form-control mb-2" placeholder="Username" required>
<input type="email" name="email" class="form-control mb-2" placeholder="Email" required>
<input type="password" name="password" class="form-control mb-2" placeholder="Password" required>
Designing a user registration system using
ensures that user information is collected and stored securely in a database. By applying techniques like password hashing, sensitive data is protected from unauthorized access. The implementation of
allows users to log in securely and maintains their session across different pages. It also helps in controlling access to protected areas of the
application. Overall, this system provides a secure, efficient, and user-friendly way to manage user registration, login, and access control in web applications.
